data.name: InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid username or password.

data.name: AccountLocked
data.value: Account is locked. Please try again later.

data.name: PasswordExpired
data.value: Password expired. Please reset it before signing in again.

data.name: CaptchaInvalid
data.value: Captcha is invalid or expired.

data.name: Unauthorized
data.value: Unauthorized. Please sign in first.

data.name: AuthenticationFailed
data.value: Authentication failed.

data.name: TokenExpired
data.value: Access token expired. Please sign in again.

data.name: Forbidden
data.value: Access denied. Insufficient permissions.

data.name: NotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: ValidationError
data.value: Validation failed.

data.name: RateLimited
data.value: Too many requests. Please try again later.

data.name: InternalError
data.value: An internal server error occurred. Please contact the administrator.

data.name: RoleCodeExists
data.value: Role code already exists.

data.name: SystemRoleCannotDelete
data.value: System roles cannot be deleted.

data.name: BuiltInConfigCannotModify
data.value: Built-in configuration cannot be modified.

data.name: FileTooLarge
data.value: File size exceeds the allowed limit.

data.name: FileTypeNotAllowed
data.value: File type is not allowed.

data.name: LowCodeAppKeyRequired
data.value: App key is required.

data.name: LowCodeAppKeyMaxLength
data.value: App key cannot exceed 100 characters.

data.name: LowCodeAppKeyFormatInvalid
data.value: App key must start with a letter and can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

data.name: LowCodeAppNameRequired
data.value: App name is required.

data.name: LowCodeAppNameMaxLength
data.value: App name cannot exceed 200 characters.

data.name: LowCodeAppDescriptionMaxLength
data.value: Description cannot exceed 1000 characters.

data.name: LowCodeAppCategoryMaxLength
data.value: Category cannot exceed 100 characters.

data.name: DynamicAlterAtLeastOneChange
data.value: At least one schema change is required.

data.name: DynamicAlterUpdateNotSupported
data.value: Updating existing fields is not supported in this version.

data.name: DynamicAlterRemoveNotSupported
data.value: Removing fields is not supported in this version.

data.name: DynamicAlterFieldNameInvalid
data.value: Invalid field name for added fields.

data.name: DynamicAlterFieldNameDuplicated
data.value: Added field names must be unique.

data.name: UsernameRequired
data.value: Username is required.

data.name: UsernameMaxLength
data.value: Username cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: UsernameNoWhitespace
data.value: Username cannot contain whitespace.

data.name: UsernameNotNumeric
data.value: Username cannot be numeric only.

data.name: PasswordRequired
data.value: Password is required.

data.name: PasswordMaxLength
data.value: Password cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: ConfirmPasswordRequired
data.value: Please confirm the password.

data.name: ConfirmPasswordMismatch
data.value: The two passwords do not match.

data.name: CurrentPasswordRequired
data.value: Current password is required.

data.name: NewPasswordRequired
data.value: New password is required.

data.name: PasswordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least {0} characters long.

data.name: PasswordRequireUppercase
data.value: Password must contain an uppercase letter.

data.name: PasswordRequireLowercase
data.value: Password must contain a lowercase letter.

data.name: PasswordRequireDigit
data.value: Password must contain a digit.

data.name: PasswordRequireNonAlphanumeric
data.value: Password must contain a non-alphanumeric character.

data.name: DynamicTableTableKeyInvalid
data.value: Table key format is invalid.

data.name: DynamicTableDisplayNameRequired
data.value: Display name is required.

data.name: DynamicTableDisplayNameMaxLength
data.value: Display name cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: DynamicTableDbTypeInvalid
data.value: The database type is not supported.

data.name: DynamicTableFieldsCountInvalid
data.value: The number of fields must be between 1 and 200.

data.name: DynamicTableFieldNameInvalid
data.value: Field name format is invalid.

data.name: DynamicTableFieldTypeInvalid
data.value: The field type is not supported.

data.name: DynamicTableFieldLengthInvalid
data.value: The field length or precision is invalid.

data.name: DynamicTableFieldValidationInvalid
data.value: The field validation rule is invalid.

data.name: DynamicTablePrimaryKeyRequired
data.value: Exactly one primary key field is required.

data.name: DynamicTablePrimaryKeyTypeInvalid
data.value: The primary key must use Int or Long.

data.name: DynamicTableFieldNamesDuplicated
data.value: Field names must be unique.

data.name: DynamicTableAutoIncrementInvalid
data.value: Auto-increment fields must be primary keys of type Int or Long.

data.name: LowCodeDataSourceIdPositive
data.value: DataSourceId must be a positive number.

data.name: LowCodeImportPackageRequired
data.value: The import package is required.

data.name: LowCodeImportAppKeyRequired
data.value: The app key in the import package is required.

data.name: LowCodeImportAppKeyMaxLength
data.value: The app key in the import package cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: LowCodeImportAppKeyInvalid
data.value: The app key in the import package is invalid.

data.name: LowCodeImportNameRequired
data.value: The app name in the import package is required.

data.name: LowCodeImportNameMaxLength
data.value: The app name in the import package cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: LowCodeImportConflictStrategyRequired
data.value: The conflict strategy is required.

data.name: LowCodeImportConflictStrategyInvalid
data.value: The conflict strategy must be Rename, Overwrite, or Skip.

data.name: LowCodeImportKeySuffixMaxLength
data.value: The key suffix cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: LowCodeImportKeySuffixInvalid
data.value: The key suffix can only contain letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens.

data.name: LowCodeEntityAliasesRequired
data.value: The entity alias list is required.

data.name: LowCodeEntityAliasesCountMax
data.value: The number of entity aliases cannot exceed {0}.

data.name: LowCodeEntityTypeRequired
data.value: Entity type is required.

data.name: LowCodeEntityTypeMaxLength
data.value: Entity type cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: LowCodeSingularAliasRequired
data.value: Singular alias is required.

data.name: LowCodeSingularAliasMaxLength
data.value: Singular alias cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: LowCodePluralAliasRequired
data.value: Plural alias is required.

data.name: LowCodePluralAliasMaxLength
data.value: Plural alias cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: FLOW_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The approval flow definition does not exist.

data.name: FLOW_NOT_PUBLISHED
data.value: The approval flow is not published.

data.name: FLOW_DEPRECATED
data.value: The approval flow has been deprecated and new instances cannot be started.

data.name: TASK_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The approval task does not exist.

data.name: TASK_NOT_PENDING
data.value: The task is not pending.

data.name: INSTANCE_NOT_RUNNING
data.value: The process instance is not running.

data.name: INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The process instance does not exist.

data.name: COPY_RECORD_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The copy record does not exist.

data.name: COPY_RECORD_NOT_OWNER
data.value: You do not have permission to access this copy record.

data.name: INVALID_OPERATION
data.value: The current operation is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_STATUS
data.value: The current status does not allow this operation.
